title: cicerbita lessertiana subsp. lyrata
intro: Cicerbita lessertiana subsp. lyrata, also known as the Lyrata Cicerbita, is a plant species within the dandelion-like genus Cicerbita, native to various parts of the world. This plant is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it beneficial in treating wounds, skin irritations, and infections. The health benefits of Cicerbita lessertiana subsp. lyrata include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and promoting overall well-being. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
